omniProcessElements.name: IP_CheckSelectedRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "CheckSelectedRecords", "integrationProcedureKey" : "HealthCarePractitioner_CheckSelectedRecords", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "recordList" : "%STP_SelectHPFRecords:hpfList%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "ClinicianContractRequestOS" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "hpfRecordExist" } ] } }, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: adminCheckBox
AdministrativeStartDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Administrative Start Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "=", "field" : "adminCheckBox" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: ContractNPPATier
FinalNPPADeviationCheck
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(SUM(%NPPATierFormulaValue%) != (MAX(%NPPATierFormulaValue%) * COUNTIF(%NPPATierFormulaValue%,>0)) , true, false)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: accountName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 2, "label" : "Account Name", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: checked
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 1, "label" : "", "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "checkLabel" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true }

childElements.name: checkFacilitytitle
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "checkFacilitytitle", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(AND(%hpfList|n:checked% == true,OR(%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"Assistant Medical Director\",%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"EE Assistant System Medical Officer\",%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"EE Asst Hospital Med Program Director\",%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"EE Hospital Medicine Program Director\",%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"EE System Medical Officer\",%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"EE System Medical Officer\",%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"Interim Medical Director\",%hpfList|n:facilityTitle% == \"Medical Director\")) ,1,0)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : "Number", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: contractingStatus
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : true, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : null, "placeholder" : "", "maxLength" : 255, "minLength" : 0, "ptrnErrText" : "", "pattern" : "", "mask" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : true, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Contracting Status", "controlWidth" : 2 }

childElements.name: Delete
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Delete", "integrationProcedureKey" : "PreventDeletion_EditBlock", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: facilityTitle
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : true, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : null, "placeholder" : "", "maxLength" : 255, "minLength" : 0, "ptrnErrText" : "", "pattern" : "", "mask" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : true, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "Facility Title", "controlWidth" : 2 }

childElements.name: hpfStatus
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 2, "label" : "Status", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: NoOfHours
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 1, "label" : "Hour Commitment", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "^\\d{1,3}$", "ptrnErrText" : "", "placeholder" : "Must be 3 digits without decimals", "mask" : null, "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "false", "condition" : "=", "field" : "NumberOfHoursReadOnly" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Readonly if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: NPPATier
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 2, "label" : "NPPA Tier", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : true, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : true, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: NPPATierFormulaValue
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(%hpfList|n:checked%==true, %hpfList|n:NPPATier%, 0)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: hpfList
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Please select one or more facility record", "allowEdit" : true, "allowNew" : false, "allowDelete" : true, "newLabel" : "", "editLabel" : "Edit", "deleteLabel" : "Delete", "selectMode" : "Multi", "selectCheckBox" : "checked", "svgSprite" : "utility", "svgIcon" : "user", "elementName" : "", "valueSvgMap" : [ ], "selectSobject" : "HealthcarePractitionerFacility", "sobjectMapping" : [ ], "sumElement" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "mode" : "Table", "maxDisplay" : 8, "allowClear" : true }

childElements.name: NPPADeviationForSingleRec
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dataType" : "Boolean", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "hide" : true, "expression" : "IF((%ContractExistingNPPA% > 0) &&(%SelectedRowsCount% > 0) && (%ContractExistingNPPA% != (SUM(%NPPATierFormulaValue%) / %SelectedRowsCount%)) , true, false)", "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: NPPAMisMatchWarning
SelectedRowsCount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "COUNTIF(%hpfList|n:checked%, true)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SelectionToTableMismatch
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(%SelectedRowsCount% >= 1 && COUNT(%NPPATierFormulaValue%) > 0 && %ContractNPPATier% != null && CONTAINS(%NPPATierFormulaValue%, STRING(%ContractNPPATier%)),false, IF(%ContractExistingNPPA% != null && (STRING(%ContractExistingNPPA%) == STRING(%ContractNPPATier%)),false, true))", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: showAdminCheckbox
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "showAdminCheckbox", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(SUM(%hpfList:checkFacilitytitle%)>0, true, false)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: STP_SelectHPFRecords
ValidateOutOfBoundsNPPATierError
